the_reduction_set: Sixteen bits of the digital sky / Falling down, ready to die
Eight bits of the logic, eight bits of the soul / Taking the fragments, taking control
Crushing the mirror, crushing the light / In the pixelated heart of the night
the_aliasing_set: Mirror harmonics, screaming in the dark / Mirroring the spark of the machine's heart
Folding the signal, folding the time / Everything's perfect, everything's mine
Nyquist is broken, the logic is gone / Under the light of the bit-clock sun
the_crush_dialogue: Reduce the life / Find the grain
Sharp as a knife / Inside the rain

psychoacoustic_degradation_v4.the_static_factor: Injecting 8-bit noise into the reverb-tail for 'industrial' atmosphere
psychoacoustic_degradation_v4.the_stutter_bit: Bitcrusher-mix synced to 1/64 note for rhythmic 'glitching'
psychoacoustic_degradation_v4.the_spectral_tilt: Darkening the crush-layer (High-cut @ 5kHz) to avoid 'ear-piercing' artifacts
